name: @ondewo/csi-client-typescript
description: ONDEWO Conversation System Integration (CSI) Client library for Typescript
author: ONDEWO GmbH <office@ondewo.com>

scripts.pretest: tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
scripts.test: c8 --check-coverage --lines 100 --branches 100 --functions 100 --include '**/offlineTokenProvider.js' --exclude '**/*.spec.js' --reporter text node --test .test-build/offlineTokenProvider.spec.js && npm run test:examples
scripts.pretest:examples: tsc examples/authenticateAndListS2sPipelines.ts --noEmit --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types && tsc examples/listS2sPipelinesExample.ts examples/listS2sPipelinesExample.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build-examples
